title: Deepslate shingles
description: Replaces deepslate tiles with deepslate shingles for perfect roofing
body:
![Top Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fcfeba3062c7f63bc89e40a763023757f45ea1c.png) \ This simple resouce pack replaces deepslate tiles and related blocks (staris, wall, slab and cracked tiles) to deepslate shingles. \ \ ![tiles to shingles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b14400d5e2bbe00761ad313ac2247840aff308c3.png) \ \ Comparison of vanilla deepslate tiles to new variated textures of deepslate shingles





**Supported languages:** - English (en_us) - Polish (pl_pl)

### Follow us on other platforms!
